zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes於大約1153年出生在法國德 艾斯特芒內蒙特米拉爾時，她的父親Guillaume William IV GOUET de Montmirail29歲，母親Isabel Élisabeth of Blois and Champagne24歲。她於大約1170年與Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1194年在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑布格斯享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes于大约1153年出生在法国德 艾斯特芒內蒙特米拉爾时，她的父亲Guillaume William IV GOUET de Montmirail29岁，母亲Isabel Élisabeth of Blois and Champagne24岁。她于大约1170年与Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1194年在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑布格斯享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gouët
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France named (Le) Douet, for example in Charente-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes was born about 1153, in Montmirail, Marne, Grand Est, France, her father, Guillaume William IV GOUET de Montmirail, was 29 and her mother, Isabel Élisabeth of Blois and Champagne, was 24. She married Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon about 1170. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1194, in Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 42.

Elle a épousé Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon environ 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1194, à Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

Sie hat um 1170 Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1194 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich.

ko.Sancerre, Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de L: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 부르그스
ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes(이)가 대략 1153년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 몽미레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume William IV GOUET de Montmirail(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Élisabeth of Blois and Champagne(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1170년 Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 부르그스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes nasceu aproximadamente 1153, em Montmirail, Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Guillaume William IV GOUET de Montmirail, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Élisabeth of Blois and Champagne, tinha 24 anos. ru.Sancerre, Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de L: бургесь, чир, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Gouët d'Alluyes родилась около 1153 г. в местности монтмиреил, марн, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume William IV GOUET de Montmirail было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Élisabeth of Blois and Champagne, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon около 1170 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1194 г. в местности бургесь, чир, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

Se casó con Herve III de Donzy de Vierzon aproximadamente 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1194, en Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
